response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and any demonstrable domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking; their C++ exposure is minimal and outdated (LabWindows/CVI), with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or financial system development, and their entire career is in web/mobile/geo-tech using TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot development skills across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated experience with CI/CD, testing frameworks, and dev-ops infrastructure
Active open-source contributor and technical educator with clear communication abilities
concerns: No professional C++ experience on Windows platform as required
No evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
SQL experience is generic; no exposure to SQL Server or Oracle in financial contexts
